foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Gas gangrene is a specific clostridial surgical infection; understanding microbiology and infection spread is essential

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Contaminated and devitalized wounds are the substrate for Clostridium perfringens colonization

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Wound debridement and aseptic technique are primary preventive measures against gas gangrene

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Severe gas gangrene causes toxemia and septic shock requiring aggressive resuscitation

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Burn wounds with devitalized tissue are susceptible to clostridial infections including gas gangrene
